name: SnapPlayerToNearest90
description: Snaps the player to the nearest multiple of 90 degrees.

ignoreYellowPad.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Yellow Pad

ignorePinkPad.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Pink Pad

ignoreBluePad.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Blue Pad

ignoreRedPad.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Red Pad

ignoreSpiderPad.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Spider Pad

ignoreYellowOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Yellow Orb

ignorePinkOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Pink Orb

ignoreBlueOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Blue Orb

ignoreGreenOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Green Orb

ignoreBlackOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Black Orb

ignoreRedOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Red Orb

ignoreGreenDashOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Green Dash Orb

ignorePinkDashOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Pink Dash Orb

ignoreSpiderOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Spider Orb

ignoreCustomOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Custom Orb

ignoreTeleportOrb.name: Don't Snap Rotation on Teleport Orb
